evidence.voice_certainty: Phrases such as “What you do with that clarity is yours” and the long clinical disclaimer replace Carr’s settled certainty with permission and caveat.
evidence.method_execution: The breakfast-versus-snack scene and accident objection land the bounded-target correction, but the pleasure question is posed for later rather than cornered and answered here.
evidence.structure_anatomy: It has a preview, thesis, titled sections, assigned numbered instruction, verdict line, and summary, but the middle becomes a taxonomy rather than an escalating case.
evidence.repetition_mantra: MN-01, MN-02, and MN-09 appear verbatim after supporting argument, but “Pleasant taste is real.” is also repeated verbatim outside the frozen mantra system.
evidence.emotional_register: Freedom and non-deprivation are repeatedly promised, yet the chapter omits the reference’s full-force wound, harsh attack on the trap, and fear-then-disown pivot.
evidence.rhythm_texture: Short pairs such as “The sensation is allowed to stand. The valuation is what we test.” work, but long disclaimer and definition blocks repeatedly halt momentum.

gap_summary: The candidate replaces Carr’s forceful, escalating certainty and wound-then-relief nerve with a cautious, policy-like investigation full of disclaimers and category management.

suggestions.suggestion: Forbid the permission-and-caveat register exemplified by “What you do with that clarity is yours” and “that care outranks every word”; require settled-fact assertions and cheerful commands once a claim is within the book’s evidence boundary.

Replace the catalog sequence “WHAT THIS BOOK IS NOT” to “BAD SUGAR: THE LINE” to “WHAT ABOUT ACCIDENTS?” with an escalation map: reader objection, concrete scene, trap question, unavoidable answer, then an ALL-CAPS verdict.

Assign the opening chapter one evidence-backed wound-and-bandage beat: deliver the relevant consequences without softening, explicitly say fear is not the method, then pivot immediately to relief and escape.
Cut the formal-boundary and Molecule Margin policy prose by at least half; turn each abstract distinction into one carrying analogy and end each section with a short verdict or killer-line pair.

Keep the three assigned frozen mantras, but flag any other exact sentence repeated between body and summary, such as “Pleasant taste is real.”, and require a paraphrase so only mantras recur verbatim.
